patch:
--- a/memory_controller.sv
+++ b/memory_controller.sv
@@ -12,9 +12,9 @@ endmodule
 module memory_controller (
   input [3:0] addr,
-  input [15:0] write_enable
+  output [15:0] write_enable  // FIXED: changed from input to output
 );
   decoder_4to16 dec_inst (
     .address(addr),
-    .decoded(write_enable)  // BUG: direction mismatch - decoder outputs, controller expects input
+    .decoded(write_enable)
   );
 endmodule
